docs.name: Particle Field
docs.description: Canvas-based floating particles with mouse-repulsion physics and responsive connecting lines.

props.name: particleCount
props.description: The number of particles rendered dynamically.

props.name: particleColor
props.description: One hex color or an array of hex colors for particles and connecting lines.

props.name: interactionRadius
props.description: The pixel radius for the mouse repulsion event.

variants.label: Single Color
Multi Color

docs.overview: ParticleField renders a canvas-based animated particle system that reacts to cursor proximity. Particles drift, connect with lines when close, and scatter away from the mouse.

scenarios.title: Ambient hero background
scenarios.description: Use as a full-section background layer behind hero text for a subtle, living atmosphere.

scenarios.title: Feature section accent
scenarios.description: Apply to an individual feature card panel to add depth without distracting from the content.
